name: Goal Command
description: Closed-loop /goal command with judge model, budget tracking, subgoals, and Obsidian sync. Synthesizes Hermes (judge + subgoals), Claude-Goal (completion audit + wall-clock), Codex (token budget), and brasco05 (classification + Obsidian).

maxTurns.description: Maximum continuation turns before BUDGET_LIMITED. Default: 20.

judgeModel.description: Judge model override (defaults to session model). Example: 'google/gemini-3-flash-preview'.

judgeTimeout.description: Judge API timeout in seconds. Default: 30.

judgeMaxTokens.description: Judge max output tokens. Reasoning models need more. Default: 4096.

maxConsecutiveParseFailures.description: Consecutive judge parse failures before auto-pause. Default: 3.

defaultTimeBudget.description: Default wall-clock budget in seconds (0 = unlimited). Default: 0.

obsidianRoot.description: Obsidian sync root directory (relative to workspace or absolute). Default: 'OpenClaw'.

classificationLang.description: Language for classification heuristics ('auto', 'en', 'de', 'ru'). 'auto' detects from goal text. Default: 'auto'.
